description: Whitespace tolerance in decoding - surrounding spaces around delimiters and values

tests.name: tolerates spaces around commas in inline arrays
tests.note: Tokens are trimmed of surrounding U+0020 spaces per §12

tests.name: tolerates spaces around pipes in inline arrays
tolerates spaces around tabs in inline arrays
tolerates leading and trailing spaces in tabular row values
tolerates spaces around delimiters with quoted values
parses empty tokens as empty string
tests.note: Empty token (nothing between delimiters) decodes to empty string

tests.name: preserves NBSP-leading unquoted value
tests.note: Token trimming removes U+0020 only; NBSP is part of the token

tests.name: preserves NBSP around inline array tokens
tests.note: A host trim() that strips the full Unicode whitespace set corrupts this round-trip
